name: sap-rfc
description: Two SAP MCP servers for Claude Code: rfc-mcp (9 RFC tools incl. text pool and SAPscript form parser) and adt-mcp (10 ADT write/check tools incl. create_program/include/class), plus connection management skills

python_path.title: Python interpreter path
python_path.description: Absolute path to a Python 3.10+ interpreter with pyrfc installed. On Windows, do NOT use bare 'python' — the WindowsApps stub will silently fail. Example: C:/Python311/python.exe (Windows) or /usr/bin/python3 (Linux/Mac). Leave blank to use 'python' from PATH.
